pi_items.source: GCompris official website (gcompris.net/screenshots-en.html), KDE Applications repository, confirmed in multiple GitHub repositories referencing reading_practice activity
Task definition in task.json, validated by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly check and create this file at this path
Task description states 'Complete at least 5 words/levels', verifier.py checks for line_count >= 5, export_result.sh counts log lines

privileged_info_summary: GCompris is a real educational software suite for children ages 2-10 with 190 activities (as of 2024). The 'Reading practice' activity is a verified real activity in the Reading category. The task requires agents to create a log file at /home/ga/Documents/reading_log.txt containing at least 5 matched words. These are all task-defined requirements that have been verified against the actual GCompris software and the task's implementation scripts.
